title: HC/PHAC Architecture Alignment Assessment
audience: CIOs, EA Directors, Data Platform Directors (HC and PHAC)
privacy: Results will be reported only in aggregate. Individual responses will not be attributed.
decisionUse: This assessment does not make the decision. It identifies where alignment exists, where executive decision is required, and which unresolved issues should be brought to ARB.
track2Label: Architecture Detail — recommended for EA/Data Platform respondents; optional for CIOs.

branching.q6_path_role: References q3_governance_timing; variants emphasize pre-flight, continuous runtime, both, or use-case-dependent governance.
branching.q7_hail_role: References q1_operating_model; variants frame HAIL as project runtime, shared runtime, or hybrid ownership.
branching.q10_gov_ops: References q2_platform_model; variants frame joint operations, clear separation, federated, independent, or undecided ownership.
branching.q12_operations_staffing: References q2_platform_model; variants frame joint, hybrid/both-organizations, federated, independent, or undecided staffing.

runtimeSourceOfTruth: server/src/questions.ts contains the full option labels, text follow-ups, and branch-context strings used by the app.
